creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
I tried to troubleshoot the issue on 13.2-RELEASE but upstream says it is a bug in the compiler version

https://github.com/audacity/audacity/issues/5362

I've tried upgrading the libs on 13.2-RELEASE and haven't tested on 12.4 but I assume it's also broken there.

It compiles fine in 13.2-STABLE and above so it must be a OS lib difference but I can't figure out how to mark as broken for only 13.2-RELEASE and not 13.2-STABLE. 

Maybe we should have a audacity 3.3 port that still works on 13.2-RELEASE and below?
